productName: - Milk Chocolate - Rosin - Macadamia Nut 100mg THC - Pouch
description: Decadent artisan chocolate inspired by humane cacao farms and old confectioner recipes, blending deep cocoa richness with a smooth, measured cannabis experience. It features THC for a classic euphoric lift. The flavor does the inviting, and the cannabis infusion follows with a smooth finish.
